Copy.ai vs Notion AI (2026): Which Should You Use?

Copy.ai and Notion AI are both popular tools in the AI Writing Tools space. Here's how they compare.

Copy.aiNotion AI
MakerCopy.aiNotion Labs
PricingFree plan available; paid plans from $49/moAdd-on from $8-10/user/mo on top of a Notion plan
Free tierYesNo
Best forQuick marketing copy like ads, captions, and product descriptions.Teams already using Notion who want built-in AI search and writing.

Copy.ai

AI copywriting tool focused on marketing content and workflow automation.

Notion AI

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
